channel.title: Saturday Morning Breakfast Cereal
channel.description: Latest Saturday Morning Breakfast Cereal comics and news

item.title: Saturday Morning Breakfast Cereal - Huh
item.description:
Click here to go see the bonus panel!

Hovertext:
Once I realized this, all those inept AI laundry-folding videos became hilarious.


Today's News:
item.dc:creator: Zach Weinersmith

item.title: Saturday Morning Breakfast Cereal - Surveil
item.description:
Click here to go see the bonus panel!

Hovertext:
I don't know if it's happened yet, but you can bet in the next few years someone will start fitting people out to collect sex training data.


Today's News:
item.dc:creator: Zach Weinersmith
